problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: If DNA computing for massively parallel search is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
